record.field: Search the knowledge base using RAG hybrid search. Calls rag.fts_search() via Supabase RPC to find relevant documents from the specified corpus.

{"type":"object","properties":{"query":{"type":"string","description":"Natural language search query"},"corpus_id":{"type":"string","description":"Corpus identifier to search within (e.g. specs, ssot, docs_ai, contracts, runbooks)"}},"required":["query"]}
Create an audit evidence pack bundling record references and query results. REQUIRES USER CONFIRMATION.

{"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string","description":"Name for the evidence pack"},"record_refs":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"model":{"type":"string"},"res_id":{"type":"integer"},"display_name":{"type":"string"}}},"description":"Array of linked record references"},"query_results":{"type":"string","description":"JSON string of query results to include as context"}},"required":["name"]}
Save a RAG query for later re-use and embedding in workspace pages. REQUIRES USER CONFIRMATION.

{"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string","description":"Display name for the saved query"},"query_text":{"type":"string","description":"The search query text to save"},"corpus_id":{"type":"string","description":"Corpus identifier the query targets"}},"required":["name","query_text"]}
